title: Love of MC
description: Love of MC is a Vanilla+ Modpack that Adds Updates which I believe would make minecraft a greater game
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab371f9de0de8a03b33d919aa76595d07c52765.png)

**Love of MC is my 1.21.1 Vanilla+ Modpack that adds updates which i believe would make Minecraft a better while not straying to far away from what makes Minecraft the game it is.**

**Below are just a few examples of changes to the game but there are many more to see**
   
   /Trailer coming soon/

# **Expansive World Update**
* **New Dungeons**
* **Overhauled Overworld**
* **Amplified Nether**
* **Nullscape End**
* **Greater loot**
![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8288767464fe0e5d8fcee4cddd59514ca056501e.jpeg)
   ![end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a8715f3618ce14d18b65c985d98056380e74c4b.png)
   ![loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc4325648e697b2451cefed83082ee8f430b5e6.jpeg)
#    Monstrous Mobs Update
* **Mob varients for hostile mobs**
* **Mob vote losers reintroduced**
* **Revamped Wither and EnderDragon Fights**
   ![dragon fight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ba81c0f583cf333e9ca2e9be84ec3bc6eb86747.png)
#    QOL, VFX and SFX Update
* **lots of texturepacks to improve GUI**
* **better environmental sounds**
* **lots of quality of life changes...lots**
* **Rolling and reworked 1.9 combat**

# Its time to jump in and experience minecraft like never before!
   
   ![little buddy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78cae4b8fd7a23c36b02823970bf5a8d57f5bab9.gif)

   [Discord](https://discord.gg/MbqfnxpA6y)
   
* Do Not Reupload modpack.

* You may make video or review content.
